title: PUBLISH-POLICY
description: Per-repo publish policy declaring the freshness invariant for the public default branch, the merge-to-main path, and the feature-branch push cadence. Universal fleet doctrine: every public repo in the fleet (and private repos that aspire to publishability) declares one of these at .flywheel/PUBLISH-POLICY.json. Authority: bead flywheel-jrpfn research (.flywheel/PLANS/auto-publish-doctrine-2026-05-20/00-research.md). Mission Duty 3 (substrate-published).

repo_slug.description: Canonical owner/name slug (e.g. 'JYeswak/flywheel'). Used by the fleet probe to correlate against gh repo list.

default_branch.description: The branch whose staleness the public-repo-freshness probe measures. Almost always 'main'.

max_main_staleness_hours.description: Freshness invariant. If origin/<default_branch>'s last commit is older than this, the probe degrades. >2x this value = critical. Public-facing repos default to 24h; doc-only repos may extend to 168h (1w).

auto_merge_policy.description: enabled = gh pr merge --auto fires when required_checks_before_merge pass (no human gate); gated = audit_bot_identity approval + required checks required, then auto-merge; disabled = humans merge manually OR direct push to main (Jeff-style solo-trust default).

audit_bot_identity.description: Which agent identity may approve PRs in 'gated' mode (e.g. 'flywheel:1', 'cm-flywheel'). For 'enabled' or 'disabled' modes this field is unused. For repos accepting external contributions, set to a sentinel like 'external-collaborator-review-required'.

required_checks_before_merge.description: List of gh check names that MUST be green before auto-merge fires. Only consulted when auto_merge_policy != 'disabled'. Names match the GitHub Actions job display-name, e.g. 'CI / lint', 'CI / test'.

feature_branch_push_policy.description: Cadence at which .flywheel/scripts/auto-push.sh pushes feature branches to origin. per-commit = post-commit hook; every-N-min = launchd/cron; manual = no automatic push. per-commit is canonical for flywheel-class repos.

last_merge_to_main_ts.description: Recorded by the freshness probe each tick. NOT authored by humans. Used to detect drift trends and to seed the doctor surface dashboard line.

pr_template_path.description: Path to the PR template within the repo. Empty/absent = no template enforced.

external_contributors_expected.description: If true, branch protection should be ON for default_branch and auto_merge_policy SHOULD NOT be 'disabled' (humans + bots both need a review surface). Flywheel/SkillOS today: false (solo-trust). zeststream-brand-voice eventually: true.

doc_freshness_carveout.description: Optional: declare specific paths whose staleness is tracked separately (e.g. docs/, README.md). Useful for *-docs repos.

notes.description: Free-form operator notes — why this policy was chosen, exceptions, links to incidents.

examples.notes: Solo-trust pattern matches Dicklesworthstone/ntm. Joshua + agents direct-push to main; PRs are review surface only.
Doc-class repo; weekly freshness floor acceptable.
Archival/dormant. 30d freshness floor. Either revive cadence or archive on GitHub.
